narrative:
Precinct Toledo 4A (precinct in Lucas County) has 1,171 registered voters, with 74.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 2.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 23.1%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 20.4 percentage points.
